title: [trd:trd-2026-001-github-issue-agent:task:TRD-014] Convention discovery (Step 0)
description:
## Task: TRD-014
TRD Reference: docs/TRD/TRD-2026-001-github-issue-agent.md#trd-014
Satisfies: REQ-020b
Estimated Hours: 3.0h
Dependencies: TRD-006, TRD-022

Body:
  - **Validates PRD ACs**: AC-020b-1, AC-020b-2, AC-020b-3
  - **Implementation AC**:
